# Generated by google (gemini-2.5-flash)
# Prompt: Build an Elasticsearch snapshot configuration for automated backups. Configure snapshot repository to S3 or file share for the operations team. Implement snapshot creation and restoration functionality.
# Category: datastore_security

# Repository configuration for S3
# PUT /_snapshot/my_s3_repository
type: s3
settings:
  bucket: your-es-snapshots-bucket
  region: us-east-1
  base_path: elasticsearch/backups
  compress: true
  max_snapshot_bytes_per_sec: 40mb
  max_restore_bytes_per_sec: 40mb

# Repository configuration for File Share
# PUT /_snapshot/my_fs_repository
type: fs
settings:
  location: /mnt/shared_es_backups
  compress: true
  max_snapshot_bytes_per_sec: 40mb
  max_restore_bytes_per_sec: 40mb

# Snapshot creation
# PUT /_snapshot/my_s3_repository/snapshot_2023_10_27_full
indices:
  - "*"
ignore_unavailable: false
include_global_state: true
partial: false
wait_for_completion: true

# Snapshot creation for specific indices
# PUT /_snapshot/my_s3_repository/snapshot_2023_10_27_logs
indices:
  - logstash-*
  - my_application_data
ignore_unavailable: true
include_global_state: false
partial: false
wait_for_completion: true

# Snapshot restoration (full cluster, replacing existing indices if they clash)
# POST /_snapshot/my_s3_repository/snapshot_2023_10_27_full/_restore
indices:
  - "*"
ignore_unavailable: false
include_global_state: true
rename_pattern: ""
rename_replacement: ""
wait_for_completion: true

# Snapshot restoration for specific indices with renaming
# POST /_snapshot/my_s3_repository/snapshot_2023_10_27_logs/_restore
indices:
  - logstash-*
  - my_application_data
ignore_unavailable: false
include_global_state: false
rename_pattern: "(.+)"
rename_replacement: "restored_$1"
wait_for_completion: true

# Snapshot restoration of a single index to a new name
# POST /_snapshot/my_s3_repository/snapshot_2023_10_27_logs/_restore
indices:
  - logstash-2023.10.26
ignore_unavailable: false
include_global_state: false
rename_pattern: "logstash-2023.10.26"
rename_replacement: "logstash-restored-2023.10.26"
wait_for_completion: true
